fleet_size: ~100 buses across 8 routes; 8 electric buses (6 deployed on Route 1 from Jan 2, 2025)
notes: Operates daily except public holidays. No standing passengers. AC + WiFi onboard. Interchangeable routes at designated transfer points.

routes.origin: Quezon City Hall (NHA Interchange, Kalayaan Ave)
key_stops: QC Hall Gate 3 (Kalayaan Ave / NHA Interchange)
routes.frequency_notes: Weekday: 15 min peak (AM 6–12:30, PM 4:15–9), 30 min midday (1–4pm). Sat: 30 min. Sun: 120 min.
routes.vehicle_type: Electric bus (e-bus, deployed Jan 2 2025), seated 41, no standing
routes.notes: E-bus route from January 2, 2025. MRT-3 Cubao connection at destination.

routes.frequency_notes: Weekday: 6 min peak (AM 6–9:24, PM 4:06–9), 30 min midday (9:30am–4pm). Sat: 30 min. Sun: 120 min.
routes.notes: Serves Commonwealth Ave and Batasan Hills corridor. 6-min peak headway is among shortest in QCityBus network.

routes.destination: Aurora Blvd / Katipunan Interchange (LRT-2 Katipunan Station)
key_stops: Aurora Blvd / Katipunan Interchange (LRT-2 Katipunan Station)
E. Rodriguez Sr. Ave / Gilmore Interchange
E. Rodriguez Sr. Ave / St. Luke's / National Children's Hospital
E. Rodriguez Sr. Ave / Araneta Ave (Quezon Institute Q.I.)
E. Rodriguez Sr. Ave / Welcome Rotonda
routes.frequency_notes: Weekday: 20 min peak (AM 6:40–9, PM 5:20–7), 60 min midday (10am–5pm). Sat: 60 min. Sun: 120 min.
routes.notes: Only route not passing QC Hall. Connects LRT-2 Katipunan and Anonas stations. Shorter operating hours than other routes.

routes.destination: General Luis Ave / SB Rd (Nova Bayan, Novaliches)
key_stops: QCU Main Campus / Novaliches District Hospital
routes.frequency_notes: Weekday: 15 min peak (AM 6–9, PM 12:15–8pm), 30 min midday. Earliest departure 5:15am. Sat: 30 min. Sun: 120 min.
routes.notes: Longest route; serves Novaliches district. Earliest start at 5:15am makes it the first QCityBus departure of the day.

routes.frequency_notes: Weekday: 15 min peak (AM 6–9, PM 4:45–9), 30 min midday (9:30am–4:30pm). Sat: 30 min. Sun: 120 min.
routes.notes: Alternative to Route 4 for Mindanao Ave; uses Visayas Ave / Congressional Ave instead of North Ave. Overlaps partially with Route 4 near Mindanao Ave.

routes.destination: Aurora Blvd (Hemady St / LRT Gilmore area)
key_stops: Scout Tobias St / A. Roces Ave
E. Rodriguez Sr. Ave / Gilmore Interchange
routes.frequency_notes: Weekday: 20 min peak (AM 6:40–9, PM 5:20–7), 60 min midday and late (7–8pm). Sat/Sun: 60/120 min.
routes.notes: Connects QC Hall to LRT-2 Gilmore Station via Quezon Ave. Stops were expanded post-June 2024 update.

routes.destination: E. Rodriguez Jr. Ave / Ortigas Ave (C5 intersection)
key_stops: C.P. Garcia Ave / Krus Na Ligas
Katipunan Ave (Santa Maria della Strada Parish)
Aurora Blvd / Katipunan Ave Interchange (LRT-2 Katipunan Station)
Katipunan Ave / P. Tuazon Ave (Quirino Memorial Medical Center)
routes.frequency_notes: Weekday: 20 min peak (AM 6:40–9, PM 5:20–8), 60 min midday (10am–5pm) and late (8–9pm). Sat/Sun: 60/120 min.
routes.notes: Serves Katipunan Ave corridor including Ateneo, LRT-2 Katipunan, Quirino Memorial Medical Center, and Eastwood. Connects to C5 at Ortigas Ave extension.

routes.route_name: QC Hall–Muñoz (via North Ave / SM North EDSA)
key_stops: North Ave (Philippine Medical Association / MRT-3 Trinoma)
SM City North EDSA / QCU (San Francisco High School)
routes.frequency_notes: Weekday: 15 min peak (7:30am–7:30pm), 30 min early (6–7am) and late (7:45–9pm). Sat: 60 min. Sun: 120 min.
routes.notes: Outbound and inbound stop lists differ slightly (one-way loop segment near SM North EDSA). Connects MRT-3 North EDSA/Trinoma at North Ave stop.
